Package index

All functions

analyze_emotions()
Analyze Emotions Using NRC Lexicon
analyze_playlist()
Analyze Playlist Lyrics

Calculate Listening Diversity
complexity_score()
Calculate Lyrical Complexity
get_lyrics()
Get Lyrics from Genius (Direct API + Simple Scraping)
get_multiple_lyrics()
Get Multiple Lyrics
get_playlist_tracks()
Get Tracks from a Spotify Playlist
get_recently_played()
Get Recently Played Tracks
get_top_tracks()
Get Top Tracks
plot_complexity()
Plot Complexity Distribution
plot_emotions_bar()
Plot Emotions
plot_emotions_web()
Plot Emotions as Radar/Web Chart
plot_listening_patterns()
Visualize Listening Patterns Over Time
plot_scatter()
Plot Sentiment vs Complexity Scatter
plot_sentiment()
Plot Sentiment Distribution
plot_sentiment_arc()
Plot Sentiment Arc
plot_themes()
Plot Lyrical Themes
plot_top_complex()
Plot Top 10 Most Complex Songs
positive_negative_ratio()
Calculate Positive/Negative Ratio
preview_lyrics()
Preview Lyrics
sentiment_arc()
Calculate Sentiment Arc
sentiment_score()
Calculate Overall Sentiment Score
spotify_auth()
Connect to Spotify API
theme_detection()

view_lyrics()
